finding: The deployment identity verifier previously accepted any supplied URL and any redirect target whose content matched the research-surface markers. Deployment evidence now requires HTTPS and an allowed Cloudflare Pages hostname for the mirror-cartographer-research project, or an explicitly configured custom hostname.

verification.result: 4 passed, 0 failed in isolated Node runtime using byte-identical source before commit
cases: accept expected production and branch/deployment Pages hosts
reject unrelated and lookalike suffix hosts
require HTTPS and reject embedded credentials or nonstandard ports
allow only explicitly approved custom hosts

falsification_route: Provide a URL or redirect target outside the expected Pages hostname suffix that the verifier accepts, or an expected Cloudflare deployment hostname that the policy incorrectly rejects.
privacy_boundary: No credentials, account identifiers, private chat, health information, diagnosis, or treatment claims are present.
limits: No live Cloudflare deployment was available for runtime verification.
Hostname authorization does not prove content truth or operator control by itself.
Custom domains must be explicitly configured before they can be accepted.
